name: run_slingshot_trajectory
description: Infer single-cell lineages and pseudotime with Slingshot (Street 2018): from a low-dimensional embedding (obsm) + cluster labels (obs), order clusters into smooth lineages via a minimum spanning tree + simultaneous principal curves, and assign each cell a pseudotime along every lineage it belongs to. Robust for tree-shaped differentiation. Returns the lineage structure (ordered cluster sequences) and per-cell pseudotime; optionally anchor with a known start and/or terminal clusters. Input is a server-accessible .h5ad.

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path to an .h5ad AnnData with a reduced embedding in obsm and cluster labels in obs.

embedding_key.description: obsm key of the embedding to build the trajectory on (default 'X_pca'; e.g. 'X_umap').

cluster_key.description: obs column with cluster labels whose centroids are ordered into lineages.

start_cluster.description: Known root cluster to start every lineage from (optional but recommended for directionality).

end_clusters.description: Known terminal cluster(s) to force as lineage endpoints (optional).

n_dims.description: Use only the first n_dims columns of the embedding (default: all; for X_pca, 10-20 is typical).

lineages.description: List of lineages, each an ordered sequence of cluster labels from root to terminal.

cluster_pseudotime.description: {cluster: {lineage: mean_pseudotime}} — per-cluster mean pseudotime along each lineage.

pseudotime.description: Per-cell pseudotime matrix (cells x lineages; null where a cell is not on a lineage); omitted if n_cells > 50000.

cell_ids.description: obs_names aligned with pseudotime rows (present when pseudotime is returned).

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
